evidence.beauty: The lesson foregrounds sung memory, symbolic space, emotional registers, and links to written literature.
evidence.decolonization: Centers Ukrainian cultural agency while marking old ethnonyms, imperial names, and Soviet-style flattening as source-bound frames.
evidence.engagement: Six readings, myth box, notes, bridge, inline comparison, and motif work support varied close reading.
evidence.naturalness: Ukrainian seminar prose is learner-facing and cleaned of process/register artifacts; title and description are Ukrainian.
evidence.pedagogical: Teaches historical-song genre through form, voice, source limits, and six public readings rather than procedural answer-writing.
evidence.review: Claude Opus 4.8 follow-up PASS plus final-delta APPROVE; primary-reading divergences resolved with source-faithful omissions.
evidence.tone: C1 seminar tone is analytical, source-disciplined, and respectful without romantic overclaiming.
